svg.title: Cypress test data flow across three stages
svg.desc: Data flows left to right through three stages. Stage 1 data sources (env and JSON fixtures) feed stage 2 runtime methods and page objects, which drive stage 3 UI elements; the DSO modal and grid cell both feed Mocha assertions.

g.onclick: sendPrompt('What is stored in cypress.env.json and when is it loaded?')
sendPrompt('How is users.json used for negative login tests?')
sendPrompt('What fields does dsopanel.json provide to the DSO form?')
sendPrompt('What is addCustomPricing.json and how is it injected?')
sendPrompt('How does Cypress.env() expose environment variables to tests?')
sendPrompt('What do the cy.login() and cy.logout() custom commands do?')
sendPrompt('How does cy.fixture() load JSON test data?')
sendPrompt('What is the role of ApiClient.js and cy.request()?')
sendPrompt('What does the login form verification check?')
sendPrompt('What inputs are on the DSO modal form?')
sendPrompt('How does the assertion compare totals to final prices?')
sendPrompt('What does the multicalendar grid cell display?')
